name: Equativ
description: Independent ad platform (formerly Smart AdServer) offering SSP, DSP and SDK for mobile in-app monetization.

seo.title: Equativ — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Equativ: Independent ad platform (formerly Smart AdServer) offering SSP, DSP and SDK for mobile in-app monetization.

when_to_use: SSP + DSP + SDK for independent mobile and web ad monetization
In-app mobile ad serving with transparent programmatic demand access
CTV and video monetization through independent programmatic platform
Direct deal and programmatic hybrid monetization for premium publishers

pros: Full SSP plus DSP plus video stack
cons: Rebrand from Smart AdServer still confusing
Mobile SDK less polished than web offering
review.verdict: Strong EU-independent stack for publishers wary of Google, but mobile feels secondary to web.
review.best_for: European publishers and broadcasters needing GDPR-first independent ad tech.
review.not_for: Small mobile-only publishers who need fast self-serve onboarding.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
